TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1938 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tufuga Efi, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Samoa anini i ci Tufuga Efi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i to~u~ufo~u~u*a …ôfi, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u samo~ua anini i ¶i to~u~ufo~u~u*a …ôfi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1938 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tufuga Efi, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Samoa anini i ci Tufuga Efi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2007 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 11 a romi'ad.
